LSE-HS12-L4-13001400-HSELA1112-SRW-GBL-01 • HS English/ELA: Grades 11-12 • Figurative and Connotative Meaning

The Frame Around Home

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about what the teacher is teaching, explain the reasoning she gives about what the word carries and what the framing must do, and state the conclusion about how figurative weight has to be read by the camera.
